title: CONSENSUS STANDARDS AND OTHER REFERENCE DOCUMENTS

data.rule: CONSENSUS STANDARDS AND OTHER REFERENCE DOCUMENTS

title: This section lists the consensus standards and other documents that shall be considered part of this standard to the extent referenced in Chapters 11 through 22. Those referenced documents identi fi e

data.rule: This section lists the consensus standards and other documents that shall be considered part of this standard to the extent referenced in Chapters 11 through 22. Those referenced documents identi fi ed by an asterisk (*) are not consensus standards; rather, they are documents developed within the industry and represent acceptable procedures for design and construction to the extent referred to in the speci fi ed section.
